rationale: The citing paper centers on how visual design cues (logo asymmetry) influence brand evaluations/equity, while the cited paper provides prior empirical evidence that visual-art cues affect product evaluations via a perceptual mechanism (luxury spillover). Given this direct conceptual overlap in visual-cue effects, the citation could be serving as a theory/foundational source, and the available evidence (DOI-only reference match) is insufficient to safely treat it as an obvious incidental mention.
